title: Senior Teacher - IL&FS Skills - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IL&FS Skills - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Senior Teacher in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!
